SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-23-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF SARAH AKKOUSH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATIONS IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY KATHY ZUMSKI, PARALEGAL. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT: JPMORGAN MUST REPORT TO CREDIT AGENCIES THE CHARGE OFF / CO CODE WAS COMPLETED IN MARCH 2020. ANY CHARGE OFF / CO FOR APRIL 2020 MUST BE REMOVED. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-23-2021 IF THIS AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCES THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
